stemHtml:
The determination of the maximum mass on brake release, of an aeroplane & certified under CS-25 with 5°, 15° and 25° flaps angles on take-off, leads to the following values with zero wind:

Wind correction: Head wind: +400 kg / kt
Tail wind: -600 kg / kt

Given that the tail wind component is equal to 5 kt, the maximum mass on brake release and corresponding flap angle will be…
